title: Added Local Analytics Save Tags API
summary: Moved the first analytics write route, save-tags, into the local Studio app server while keeping the broader tag write-server mutation set unchanged.
effect: Migrated local app pages can now save tag assignments through /studio/api/analytics/save-tags using the existing assignment planner, atomic write helper, backup directory, compact log path, and Studio activity attachment. The browser transport prefers the runtime endpoint when local app config is present and keeps the old 127.0.0.1:8787 fallback for unmigrated Jekyll-hosted pages.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, analytics adapter, config, and smoke files
tests/smoke/tag_route_shell_modules.py passed with loopback server permissions
